subcodes.first_line: The springtime of utterance hath come, and the tokens of mercy and bounty have appeared from the April showers of God's grace, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی ربیع البیان و ظهرت آثار الرحمه و الکرم من نیسان عنایه الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
